description: Build The Block is a reality show set in the metaverse, featuring 12 ambitious entrepreneur startup teams competing to impress prominent voices from the Web3 space. The show highlights high-pressure moments and the excitement of building innovative projects.
topic_summary: In this trailer for Build The Block, teams compete in the metaverse to impress judges and become champions. The show promises excitement and innovation as participants strive to realize their dreams [t=0:24-0:57].
